component.name: SkillFishOS Tuner
component.summary: Overclock, undervolt and tune the AMD BC-250 without a terminal
Overclock, undervolt e tuning della AMD BC-250 senza terminale

description.p: The control centre for the AMD BC-250: overclock and undervolt the CPU, drive the GPU safe-point governor, control the fan, resize the shared VRAM, and manage Compute Units live — a grid of CU squares (24/32/40 presets, no reboot) with a CU health test for the silicon lottery.

Four ready presets (Stock, Performance, Turbo, Crazy), benchmark-and-rollback testing that applies a setting, stresses it and reverts if unstable, and a pop-up live monitor during any test. Bilingual (IT/EN); privileged actions go through a single authenticated helper.

Il centro di controllo della AMD BC-250: overclock e undervolt della CPU, governor GPU al safe-point, controllo ventola, ridimensionamento della VRAM condivisa e gestione live delle Compute Unit — una griglia di quadratini CU (preset 24/32/40, senza riavvio) con un test di salute CU per la lotteria del silicio.

Quattro preset pronti (Stock, Performance, Turbo, Crazy), test con benchmark-e-rollback che applica un'impostazione, la stressa e la ripristina se instabile, e un monitor live durante ogni test. Bilingue (IT/EN); le azioni privilegiate passano da un singolo helper autenticato.
